validation.costAmountInvalid: Cost must be a number with up to two decimals.
validation.costCurrencyInvalid: Currency must be a 3-letter code (e.g. EUR).

validation.expectedReturnAtInvalid: Expected return must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.providerContactTooLong: Contact must be 200 characters or fewer.

validation.reasonTooLong: Reason must be 1000 characters or fewer.
validation.sentAtInvalid: Sent date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
